title: Table created from template, subitems disappear
excerpt: The automation creates tables from prepared templates. When items are added, everything is OK. When a subitem is added, after refreshing the browser, the added subitem disappears. The creation of a subitem does not appea…

posts.author: Bernard (Bernard Różański)
posts.cookedHtml: The automation creates tables from prepared templates. When items are added, everything is OK. When a subitem is added, after refreshing the browser, the added subitem disappears. The creation of a subitem does not appear in the activity log. Has anyone encountered something like this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bernard,

This definitely sounds a little strange!

Can you elaborate further on how the subitem is being created - is it manually or via an automation? Is it possible for you to send over a screen-recording of this behaviour in action? This way I can grab some visual context to better understand where things are going wrong - thank you
